_comment: Gym 2 leader reveal — plays as hua_zhan/aya_transform fires (the function runs the body swap the same tick, so the camera opens on the groundskeeper spot as Leader Blossom appears in the burst). Aya body at 1381.5/93/2060 by the west stair. No ambientWeather. TODO(showrunner): nudge keyframes if the stair geometry clips the path.
